name: Calculadora Retorno Acoes
desc: Calcule Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Exemplo: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%....
description: Calcule Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Exemplo: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%....
seo_title: Calculadora Retorno Acoes – Fácil e Grátis
seo_description: Calcule Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Exemplo: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%..
example_label: Calculating total return on stock bought at €45.50, sold at €58.75, with €3.20 dividends received.
result_context: The retorno_pct of {retorno_pct}% is your total return including dividends. The ganancia of {ganancia} is profit per share.
formula_display: Total Return% = [(Sale Price - Purchase Price + Dividends) ÷ Purchase Price] × 100
mistakes: Forgetting to include dividends in total return calculation
Not accounting for transaction costs and taxes on gains
Comparing returns without considering holding period
